title: FastMineCartsCombined
description: makes minecarts go faster on designated blocks
body:
# FastMinecartsCombined

**Ultimate Minecart Speed & Control for Minecraft 1.21.11**

FastMinecartsCombined lets you take full control of your minecarts:

- 🚄 **Custom block speeds** – Set faster or slower speeds for any block type.
- ⬆️⬇️ **In-game speed adjustment GUI** – Click to increase or decrease speeds per block.
- ⏹️ **Stop on exit** – Minecarts stop automatically when players disembark.
- 🔄 **Reload config in-game** – Apply changes instantly with `/fmcreload`.
- 🧩 **Optional TrainCarts support** - When the TrainCarts plugin is installed, minecarts use rail locked physics and will not derail at high speeds. Without TrainCarts installed, vanilla Minecraft physics are used.

**Permissions:**
- `minecartspeed.gui` → Allows opening the speed GUI
- `minecartspeed.reload` → Allows reloading the config

**Commands:**
- `/mcspeed` → Open the GUI
- `/fmcreload` → Reload config without restarting the server

**License:** [MIT License](https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT)

**Installation:**
1. Place the `.jar` in your server's `plugins` folder.
2. Start your server once to generate the default config.
3. Edit `config.yml` to set default and max speeds, and block speeds.
4. Use `/mcspeed` to adjust speeds in-game.

**Note:** 
- High speeds are limited for safety; extremely high values may cause unexpected behavior.
- Uses vanilla minecart maxSpeed mechanics
- No velocity forcing or direction overrides
- High speeds may derail unless TrainCarts is installed(still under preview)

**Future version plans**
- add own physics engine to stop derailment instead of using 3rd party plug-in
